reports.issue: This article claims pglite-oxide supports iOS and Android mobile use, which is contradicted by newer analysis in the snapshot that says it only ships desktop AOT assets and has no validated mobile support.
reports.suggestion: Revise the platform-support section to remove iOS and Android claims and align the storage recommendations with the newer mobile database analysis.

reports.issue: This article duplicates the same pglite-oxide mobile-platform correction already covered by the older pglite-oxide architecture article.
reports.suggestion: Merge the overlapping guidance into a single canonical pglite-oxide reference and keep only one article for the platform-compatibility correction.

reports.issue: This article presents the same mobile-storage correction and replacement decision as the newer pglite-oxide correction article, making the two entries redundant.
reports.suggestion: Consolidate both articles into one updated storage-decision entry and redirect the duplicate to the canonical version.
